_comment: Generated allowlist of ERROR-level Supabase advisors known to be present on lcc-opps (project xengecqvemvfknjvbvrq) as of bootstrap. Anything ERROR-level not in this list will trigger an alert via the supabase-advisor-check workflow. To remove an entry: fix the underlying issue (enable RLS, switch SECURITY DEFINER -> SECURITY INVOKER, etc.) and delete the matching row. To regenerate from scratch: run scripts/bootstrap-advisor-allowlist.mjs.
